critical_path: Resolve ElasticStage artwork upload error immediately - this was the final blocker for this completed release

Process any outstanding vinyl fulfillment issues
Review repress timeline for second vinyl run
blockers: ElasticStage artwork upload error - needs technical resolution for archival purposes
